title: Genomics
description: The Genomics module integrates genomic data with OMOP clinical data to support translational and precision medicine research. Researchers can explore genotype-phenotype relationships, leverage variant data in cohort definitions, and conduct genomic analyses alongside traditional observational studies.
tips: Link genomic data to clinical cohorts using patient identifiers to enable integrated genotype-phenotype analyses.
Review data governance and consent documentation before including genomic data in shareable study packages.
Validate variant annotations against current reference databases to ensure genomic data quality before analysis.
Use genomic features in combination with OMOP clinical data for richer patient stratification in prediction models.
